policy: Roadmap deep-context files are decision context for the watcher. They must be consulted before changing frontier, sequencing, pillar priority, project boundaries, or public-safe summaries. They must not be published raw into public roadmap output.

sources.title: Deep Context Digest — 2026-07-06 — Gemini Tribe Fit: Truth vs. Transgression
sources.decision_use: Consult before changing Homes for Hands direction, Crew Blueprint scope, Deadhang-to-Homestead relationship, milestone sequencing, or roadmap DNA/toolkit boundaries.

sources.title: Roadmap Deep Context Category Rules
sources.decision_use: Consult for how deep-context files should be stored, summarized, converted, and protected from raw public exposure.
